title: festuca brachyphylla var. rydbergii
intro: Festuca brachyphylla var. rydbergii, also known as Rydberg's fescue or little fescue, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Festuca brachyphylla var. rydbergii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Festuca brachyphylla var. rydbergii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
